Class Synapse

java.lang.Object
org.jscience.natural.biology.neuroscience.Synapse
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable, Commented, ComprehensiveIdentification, Identified<Identification>, Named
public class Synapse extends Object implements ComprehensiveIdentification
Synapse connecting two neurons.
Since:
1.0
Author:
Silvere Martin-Michiellot, Gemini AI (Google DeepMind)
See Also:
  • Serialized Form

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    Synapse(String synapseType)
    Creates a synapse with a specific type (for bridge use).
    Synapse(SpikingNeuron pre, SpikingNeuron post, double weight, double delay)
    Creates a synapse between spiking neurons.
